title: Fit Check Call (40 min) between JOSE Da Silva

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To determine if SystemHustle's lead-gen services fit Virtual Emily's new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Virtual Emily is pivoting from a VA agency to a global staffing marketplace, using a new tech platform to unlock enterprise clients and scale.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**Lead-Gen Gap:** A broken email funnel and a reliance on unpredictable referrals create a critical need for a new lead source to fuel the pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Offer Mismatch:** SystemHustle's retainer-based model was rejected. Virtual Emily will only pay for converted leads ($300–$1,000/lead), citing a new agency partnership and a focus on sales-driven spend.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** SystemHustle will explore the pay-per-lead model by targeting specific, high-margin roles (e.g., exec admins, CS teams) that are easy to fill.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

## Topics

### The Strategic Pivot: From Agency to Marketplace

  - [**Problem:** Virtual Emily's previous email marketing funnel is broken, and its referral-based lead flow is unpredictable.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new tech platform enables a pivot to a global staffing marketplace.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Functionality:** A "talent store" for clients to browse and hire pre-vetted candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [**Value Prop:** Provides tech for employee monitoring (reports, screen recording) to make remote work more measurable and secure, addressing a key client concern.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Impact:** The platform's tech and cybersecurity capabilities unlock enterprise clients, a segment previously inaccessible.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Enterprise deals can yield 50+ placements at once, a volume that would take a year to achieve with SMBs.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Target:** Enterprise clients needing remote US-based talent (e.g., cruise lines, government).](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### The New Service Tiers & Ideal Client

  - [**Service Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Offshoring (Asia):** $5–$12/hr for back-end/mechanical tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Nearshoring (LatAm):** $10–$15/hr for front-facing roles (CS, sales) where cultural proximity and English proficiency are valued.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
      - [**Local (US/Europe):** $30–$40+/hr for high-end talent.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Ideal Client Profile:**](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Target:** US-based SMBs ($10M–$20M revenue) in scaling mode.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Why:** These companies need partners to help them organize growth. Once they are too large, they already have established partners.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Decision Maker:** CEO/owner, 40–60 years old.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Geography:** TX, FL, NY, CA account for 60–70% of sales.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Client Lifetime Value (CLV):** High stickiness. Clients who renew after 90 days typically stay 2–3+ years.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

### Lead-Gen Offer & Negotiation

  - [**SystemHustle's Offer:** A retainer-based service to deliver 10–15 qualified enterprise CTO/hiring manager meetings in 90 days.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**Virtual Emily's Counter-Offer:** Rejected the retainer model. Will only pay for converted leads on a commission basis.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A new agency partnership covers retainer-based marketing, and the budget is now focused on sales-driven spend.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [**Proposed Lead Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
          - [Low-level: $300](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
          - [Mid-level: $500](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
          - [Enterprise/Team: $1,000](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [**Qualification Criteria:** A decision-maker with immediate interest, a clear profile need, and a budget.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Leonid Shvorob (SystemHustle):** Email Jose Da Silva to clarify high-margin, easy-to-fill roles for a potential pay-per-lead campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [**Jose Da Silva (Virtual Emily):** Respond to the email with the requested role details.](https://fathom.video/share/R_KyVnVDmE7y2jjq7h_Fsph6xtKRTUyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)

action_items.description: Email Jose re: target roles + lead-gen Qs; request replies
